-We are getting a lot of glitches with applications, where people have submitted all of their information but are getting emails saying that we do not have all of their information. It’s happening constantly
-Just putting in the notes again, that mats are still not being completed by the morning staff
- We should really come up with a better way to promote IV drips and vitamin shots for when the nurses are here. I also think that we should have a big sign made to hang somewhere for when they come in. I think it would do much better than it has been if we were marketing it properly or more strategically.
